description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 9th; Slot wrist; Price 16,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This heavy silver bracelet is etched with icons of purity, fidelity, chastity, and honor, and glows with a soft white light whenever its owner prays. The wearer of this bracelet treats her paladin level as 4 higher than normal for the purpose of her smite evil class feature. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, align weapon; Special creator must be a paladin; Cost 8,000 gp
